name: Visit Video Logger
releaseNotes: Adds black-screen driving mode. The BLACK switch blanks the live display with a centered REC timecode while the normal camera/map recording composition continues. Touching the black screen reveals the regular app for 10 seconds, then returns to black if the switch remains on.
description: Visit Video Logger records driving or travel videos with a composed camera, map, GPS, heading, speed, timestamp, and optional front-camera picture-in-picture overlay. It includes stationary GPS/compass smoothing and a black-screen recording mode for lower distraction and battery use.
